briefing.text: The uplink is down. Find the code and get to the terminal.

greet.text: You made it. Thank you — for my family, for all of it. The System forgot this place a long time ago. Out here in the background world, we look out for each other.

codes.text: To move through the background world's dark net, you'll need the green access codes for the uplink terminals. No codes, no passage. Find them.

family.text: I have to find safe passage for my family first. But our paths will cross again — soon. Stay sharp until then.

greet.text: Our paths cross again. Listen close — the next stretch is the hard part.

nexus.text: Travel through the Uplink Terminal on this level. It leads to The Nexus — that's where you'll find the Spear of Destiny.

core.text: Then go to The Mainframe Core. Upload the Spear's power and force a system reboot.

warning.text: Be wary of the core's stone sentinel guards. Stay sharp.

found.text: The Spear of Destiny answers your grip. Circuit-runes flare along the blade — raw system authority, unstable and absolute.

power.text: Carry it to the Mainframe Core. Upload its power and force a full system reboot — the only way to break The System's hold.
